info.name: Lumefy API
info.description: Coleccion generada desde el OpenAPI real del backend Lumefy.

exec: // Define {{baseUrl}} and {{access_token}} in the environment before running protected endpoints.

request.description:
Read Companies

Endpoint: `/api/v1/admin/companies`

Retrieve all companies (Super Admin only).

Create Company

Endpoint: `/api/v1/admin/companies`

Register a new company (Tenant) with full onboarding:
Creates Company + Default Branch + Admin Role + First Admin User.

Update Company

Endpoint: `/api/v1/admin/companies/{id}`

Update company details (including plan/status).

Send Manual Notification

Endpoint: `/api/v1/admin/notifications/send`

Send a manual notification to one or all users.

Read Templates

Endpoint: `/api/v1/admin/notifications/templates`

List all notification templates (Super Admin).

Create Template

Endpoint: `/api/v1/admin/notifications/templates`

Create a new notification template (Super Admin).

Update Template

Endpoint: `/api/v1/admin/notifications/templates/{id}`

Update a notification template.

Read Settings

Endpoint: `/api/v1/admin/settings`

Get all system settings.

Update Settings Bulk

Endpoint: `/api/v1/admin/settings/bulk`

Update multiple settings at once (Upsert).

Read Public Settings

Endpoint: `/api/v1/admin/settings/public`

Get public settings (e.g. Branding) - No Auth required.

Read Admin Stats

Endpoint: `/api/v1/admin/stats`

Get SaaS Statistics (KPIs).

Read Users

Endpoint: `/api/v1/admin/users`

Retrieve all users (Super Admin only).

Impersonate Company

Endpoint: `/api/v1/admin/users/impersonate-company/{company_id}`

Impersonate the admin of a company (Super Admin only).

Impersonate User

Endpoint: `/api/v1/admin/users/{user_id}/impersonate`

Impersonate another user (Super Admin only).
Returns an access token for the target user.

Admin List Catalog

Endpoint: `/api/v1/apps/admin/catalog`

Admin Create App

Endpoint: `/api/v1/apps/admin/catalog`

Admin Update App

Endpoint: `/api/v1/apps/admin/catalog/{slug}`

List Catalog

Endpoint: `/api/v1/apps/catalog`

Update App Config

Endpoint: `/api/v1/apps/config/{slug}`

Run Demo Hello

Endpoint: `/api/v1/apps/demo/hello`

Install App

Endpoint: `/api/v1/apps/install/{slug}`

List Installed

Endpoint: `/api/v1/apps/installed`

Get Installed Detail

Endpoint: `/api/v1/apps/installed/{slug}`

Get Billing Summary

Endpoint: `/api/v1/apps/installed/{slug}/billing`

Get Installed Events

Endpoint: `/api/v1/apps/installed/{slug}/events`

Rotate Api Key

Endpoint: `/api/v1/apps/installed/{slug}/rotate-api-key`

Rotate Client Secret

Endpoint: `/api/v1/apps/installed/{slug}/rotate-client-secret`

Rotate Webhook Secret

Endpoint: `/api/v1/apps/installed/{slug}/rotate-webhook-secret`

Get Webhook Deliveries

Endpoint: `/api/v1/apps/installed/{slug}/webhooks/deliveries`

Retry Webhook Delivery

Endpoint: `/api/v1/apps/installed/{slug}/webhooks/deliveries/{delivery_id}/retry`

Send Test Webhook

Endpoint: `/api/v1/apps/installed/{slug}/webhooks/test`

Uninstall App

Endpoint: `/api/v1/apps/uninstall/{slug}`

Read Audit Logs

Endpoint: `/api/v1/audit/`

Retrieve audit logs with optional filters.

Read Branches

Endpoint: `/api/v1/branches/`

Retrieve branches.

Create Branch

Endpoint: `/api/v1/branches/`

Create new branch.

Update Branch

Endpoint: `/api/v1/branches/{id}`

Update a branch.

Delete Branch

Endpoint: `/api/v1/branches/{id}`

Delete a branch.

List Brands

Endpoint: `/api/v1/brands/`

Create Brand

Endpoint: `/api/v1/brands/`

Update Brand

Endpoint: `/api/v1/brands/{brand_id}`

Delete Brand

Endpoint: `/api/v1/brands/{brand_id}`

Read Categories

Endpoint: `/api/v1/categories/`

Retrieve categories.

Create Category

Endpoint: `/api/v1/categories/`

Create new category.

Read Category

Endpoint: `/api/v1/categories/{category_id}`

Get category by ID.

Update Category

Endpoint: `/api/v1/categories/{category_id}`

Update a category.

Delete Category

Endpoint: `/api/v1/categories/{category_id}`

Delete a category (soft delete).

Read Clients

Endpoint: `/api/v1/clients/`

Retrieve clients.

Create Client

Endpoint: `/api/v1/clients/`

Create new client.

Export Clients

Endpoint: `/api/v1/clients/export`

Export clients to Excel or CSV.

Read Client

Endpoint: `/api/v1/clients/{client_id}`

Get client by ID.

Update Client

Endpoint: `/api/v1/clients/{client_id}`

Update a client.

Delete Client

Endpoint: `/api/v1/clients/{client_id}`

Delete a client.

Get Client Activities

Endpoint: `/api/v1/clients/{client_id}/activities`

Get all activity logs for a client.

Create Client Activity

Endpoint: `/api/v1/clients/{client_id}/activities`

Create a new activity log (note, call, etc) for a client.

Register Client Payment

Endpoint: `/api/v1/clients/{client_id}/payments`

Register a payment to lower a client's debt balance.

Get Client Sales

Endpoint: `/api/v1/clients/{client_id}/sales`

Get sales history for a specific client.

Get Client Statement

Endpoint: `/api/v1/clients/{client_id}/statement`

Get the financial statement and ledger entries for a client.

Get Client Stats

Endpoint: `/api/v1/clients/{client_id}/stats`

Get CRM statistics for a client (LTV, AOV, etc).

Get Client Timeline

Endpoint: `/api/v1/clients/{client_id}/timeline`

Get a unified timeline of activities and ledger movements.

Read Current Company

Endpoint: `/api/v1/companies/me`

Get current user's company details.

Update Current Company

Endpoint: `/api/v1/companies/me`

Update current user's company details.

Get Dashboard Stats

Endpoint: `/api/v1/dashboard/`

Get statistics for the dashboard.
Optional filters: date_from, date_to (ISO format), branch_id (UUID).

Get Dashboard Health

Endpoint: `/api/v1/dashboard/health`

Read Inventory

Endpoint: `/api/v1/inventory/`

Retrieve current stock. Use filters needed.

Export Inventory

Endpoint: `/api/v1/inventory/export`

Export inventory to Excel or CSV.

Create Movement

Endpoint: `/api/v1/inventory/movement`

Register a stock movement (IN/OUT/ADJ/TRF).
Updates the Inventory table automatically.

Read Movements

Endpoint: `/api/v1/inventory/movements`

Get movement history.

Login Access Token

Endpoint: `/api/v1/login/access-token`

OAuth2 compatible token login, get an access token for future requests

Get Logistics Board

Endpoint: `/api/v1/logistics/board`

Get sales grouped by fulfillment stage for the Kanban board.

Move Sale Stage

Endpoint: `/api/v1/logistics/board/move`

Move a sale to a different fulfillment stage.

Read Package Types

Endpoint: `/api/v1/logistics/package-types`

Create Package Type

Endpoint: `/api/v1/logistics/package-types`

Update Package Type

Endpoint: `/api/v1/logistics/package-types/{id}`

Delete Package Type

Endpoint: `/api/v1/logistics/package-types/{id}`

Create Package

Endpoint: `/api/v1/logistics/packages`

Read Sale Packages

Endpoint: `/api/v1/logistics/packages/{sale_id}`

Update Picking Item

Endpoint: `/api/v1/logistics/picking/update-item`

Update the quantity picked for a specific Sale Item.

Read Notifications

Endpoint: `/api/v1/notifications/`

Get all notifications (paginated).

Mark All Notifications Read

Endpoint: `/api/v1/notifications/read-all`

Mark all notifications as read.

Read Unread Notifications

Endpoint: `/api/v1/notifications/unread`

Get unread notifications for current user.

Mark Notification Read

Endpoint: `/api/v1/notifications/{id}/read`

Mark a notification as read.

Recover Password

Endpoint: `/api/v1/password-recovery/{email}`

Password Recovery

Read Plans

Endpoint: `/api/v1/plans/`

Retrieve plans. Public endpoint (for pricing page).

Create Plan

Endpoint: `/api/v1/plans/`

Create new plan.

Read All Plans

Endpoint: `/api/v1/plans/all`

Retrieve all plans (including inactive). Super Admin only.

Update Plan

Endpoint: `/api/v1/plans/{id}`

Update a plan.

Pos Checkout

Endpoint: `/api/v1/pos/checkout`

Fast checkout logic for POS:
1. Creates Sale in COMPLETED status.
2. Deducts Inventory instantly.
3. Registers Payment.

Get Pos Config

Endpoint: `/api/v1/pos/config`

Get Pos Products

Endpoint: `/api/v1/pos/products`

Optimized endpoint to fetch all products and their stock for the POS interface.

Void Pos Sale

Endpoint: `/api/v1/pos/sales/{sale_id}/void`

List Pos Sessions

Endpoint: `/api/v1/pos/sessions`

Get Current Pos Session

Endpoint: `/api/v1/pos/sessions/current`

Open Pos Session

Endpoint: `/api/v1/pos/sessions/open`

Close Pos Session

Endpoint: `/api/v1/pos/sessions/{session_id}/close`

Reopen Pos Session

Endpoint: `/api/v1/pos/sessions/{session_id}/reopen`

Get Pos Session Stats

Endpoint: `/api/v1/pos/sessions/{session_id}/stats`

Read Pricelists

Endpoint: `/api/v1/pricelists/`

Retrieve price lists.

Create Pricelist

Endpoint: `/api/v1/pricelists/`

Create new price list.

Read Pricelist

Endpoint: `/api/v1/pricelists/{id}`

Get price list by ID.

Update Pricelist

Endpoint: `/api/v1/pricelists/{id}`

Update a price list.

Delete Pricelist

Endpoint: `/api/v1/pricelists/{id}`

Delete a price list and its items.

Add Pricelist Item

Endpoint: `/api/v1/pricelists/{id}/items`

Add item to price list.

Read Products

Endpoint: `/api/v1/products/`

Retrieve products with all relations.

Create Product

Endpoint: `/api/v1/products/`

Create new product.

body.raw:
{
  "name": "string",
  "internal_reference": "string",
  "sku": "string",
  "barcode": "string",
  "description": "string",
  "image_url": "string",
  "product_type": "STORABLE",
  "price": 0.0,
  "cost": 0.0,
  "tax_rate": 0.0,
  "weight": 1.0,
  "volume": 1.0,
  "track_inventory": true,
  "min_stock": 0.0,
  "sale_ok": true,
  "purchase_ok": true,
  "visible_in_ecommerce": false,
  "ecommerce_slug": "string",
  "ecommerce_title": "string",
  "ecommerce_description": "string",
  "ecommerce_price_override": 1.0,
  "ecommerce_compare_at_price": 1.0,
  "ecommerce_is_featured": false,
  "ecommerce_show_stock": true,
  "ecommerce_seo_title": "string",
  "ecommerce_seo_description": "string",
  "category_id": "11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111",
  "brand_id": "11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111",
  "unit_of_measure_id": "11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111",
  "purchase_uom_id": "11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111",
  "images": []
}

request.description:
Export Products

Endpoint: `/api/v1/products/export`

Export products to Excel or CSV.

Import Products

Endpoint: `/api/v1/products/import`

Import products from CSV or Excel file.

Read Product

Endpoint: `/api/v1/products/{product_id}`

Get a single product with all relations.

Update Product

Endpoint: `/api/v1/products/{product_id}`

Update a product.

body.raw:
{
  "name": "string",
  "internal_reference": "string",
  "sku": "string",
  "barcode": "string",
  "description": "string",
  "image_url": "string",
  "images": [
    {
      "image_url": "string",
      "order": 0
    }
  ],
  "product_type": "string",
  "price": 1.0,
  "cost": 1.0,
  "tax_rate": 1.0,
  "weight": 1.0,
  "volume": 1.0,
  "track_inventory": true,
  "min_stock": 1.0,
  "sale_ok": true,
  "purchase_ok": true,
  "visible_in_ecommerce": true,
  "ecommerce_slug": "string",
  "ecommerce_title": "string",
  "ecommerce_description": "string",
  "ecommerce_price_override": 1.0,
  "ecommerce_compare_at_price": 1.0,
  "ecommerce_is_featured": true,
  "ecommerce_show_stock": true,
  "ecommerce_seo_title": "string",
  "ecommerce_seo_description": "string",
  "category_id": "11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111",
  "brand_id": "11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111",
  "unit_of_measure_id": "11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111",
  "purchase_uom_id": "11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111"
}

request.description:
Delete Product

Endpoint: `/api/v1/products/{product_id}`

Delete a product and its variants.

Add Variant

Endpoint: `/api/v1/products/{product_id}/variants`

Add a variant to a product.

Update Variant

Endpoint: `/api/v1/products/{product_id}/variants/{variant_id}`

Update a product variant.

Delete Variant

Endpoint: `/api/v1/products/{product_id}/variants/{variant_id}`

Delete a product variant.

Read Purchases

Endpoint: `/api/v1/purchases/`

Retrieve purchase orders.

Create Purchase

Endpoint: `/api/v1/purchases/`

Create Purchase Order.

Export Purchases

Endpoint: `/api/v1/purchases/export`

Export purchases to Excel or CSV.

Read Purchase

Endpoint: `/api/v1/purchases/{purchase_id}`

Get purchase by ID.

Update Purchase

Endpoint: `/api/v1/purchases/{purchase_id}`

Update a purchase order (only DRAFT status).

Delete Purchase

Endpoint: `/api/v1/purchases/{purchase_id}`

Delete a purchase order. Only DRAFT can be deleted.

Download Pdf

Endpoint: `/api/v1/purchases/{purchase_id}/pdf/order`

Download Purchase Order PDF.

Receive Purchase

Endpoint: `/api/v1/purchases/{purchase_id}/receive`

Receive items for a purchase order (supports partial receipts).
Each call records the received quantities and creates IN movements.

Update Purchase Status

Endpoint: `/api/v1/purchases/{purchase_id}/status`

Update PO Status. Handling RECEIVED triggers inventory update.

Register

Endpoint: `/api/v1/register`

Register a new user and company (Self-Service).

Get Daily Close Summary

Endpoint: `/api/v1/reports/daily-close`

Daily close summary for operations: sales, payments, returns and POS sessions.

Get Financial Summary

Endpoint: `/api/v1/reports/financial-summary`

Get revenue, costs, and profit.

Get Inventory Turnover

Endpoint: `/api/v1/reports/inventory-turnover`

Get products with highest/lowest turnover (sales vs stock).

Get Inventory Value

Endpoint: `/api/v1/reports/inventory-value`

Get total inventory value and status.

Get Pos Operations Summary

Endpoint: `/api/v1/reports/pos-operations`

Consolidated operational report for POS sessions (day-level):
opened/closed/reopened/open-now, cash over/short and top cashiers.

Get Sales By Category

Endpoint: `/api/v1/reports/sales-by-category`

Get revenue grouped by category.

Get Sales Summary

Endpoint: `/api/v1/reports/sales-summary`

Get daily sales summary.

Get Top Products

Endpoint: `/api/v1/reports/top-products`

Get top selling products by quantity.

Reset Password

Endpoint: `/api/v1/reset-password`

Reset Password

List Returns

Endpoint: `/api/v1/returns`

List return orders for the company.

Create Return

Endpoint: `/api/v1/returns`

Create a return order from a sale.

Get Return

Endpoint: `/api/v1/returns/{return_id}`

Get a single return order.

Approve Return

Endpoint: `/api/v1/returns/{return_id}/approve`

Approve a return, restore inventory and apply financial reversal when needed.

Reject Return

Endpoint: `/api/v1/returns/{return_id}/reject`

Reject a return order.

Read Roles

Endpoint: `/api/v1/roles/`

Retrieve all roles for current company.

Create Role

Endpoint: `/api/v1/roles/`

Create a new role.

Read Role

Endpoint: `/api/v1/roles/{role_id}`

Get role by ID.

Update Role

Endpoint: `/api/v1/roles/{role_id}`

Update a role.

Delete Role

Endpoint: `/api/v1/roles/{role_id}`

Delete a role. Fails if users are still assigned to it.

Read Sales

Endpoint: `/api/v1/sales/`

Retrieve sales orders.

Create Sale

Endpoint: `/api/v1/sales/`

Create a new Sale (Quote or Order).
Does NOT affect inventory immediately unless status is CONFIRMED (which shouldn't be initial status usually).

Export Sales

Endpoint: `/api/v1/sales/export`

Export sales to Excel or CSV.

Read Sale

Endpoint: `/api/v1/sales/{id}`

Get sale by ID.

Delete Sale

Endpoint: `/api/v1/sales/{id}`

Delete a sale. Only DRAFT or QUOTE can be deleted.

Download Pdf

Endpoint: `/api/v1/sales/{id}/pdf/{doc_type}`

Download PDF document (invoice, picking, packing).

Update Status

Endpoint: `/api/v1/sales/{id}/status`

Update Sale status. Handles inventory logic.

Complete Sale

Endpoint: `/api/v1/sales/{sale_id}/complete`

Mark a delivered sale as completed.

Confirm Delivery

Endpoint: `/api/v1/sales/{sale_id}/deliver`

Confirm delivery of a dispatched sale.

Global Search

Endpoint: `/api/v1/search`

Global search across multiple entities (Products, Clients, Sales, Users).
Scoped to the current user's company unless Super Admin (though UI context usually dictates scope).
For now, we scope everything to the tenant/company for safety.

List Stock Takes

Endpoint: `/api/v1/stock-take/`

List all stock takes for this company.

Create Stock Take

Endpoint: `/api/v1/stock-take/`

Create a new stock take for a branch.
Automatically loads all current inventory for that branch.

Get Stock Take

Endpoint: `/api/v1/stock-take/{stock_take_id}`

Get a stock take with all its items.

Apply Stock Take

Endpoint: `/api/v1/stock-take/{stock_take_id}/apply`

Apply the stock take: generate ADJ movements for all items with differences.

Cancel Stock Take

Endpoint: `/api/v1/stock-take/{stock_take_id}/cancel`

Cancel a stock take without applying changes.

Update Counts

Endpoint: `/api/v1/stock-take/{stock_take_id}/count`

Update counted quantities for items in a stock take.

Read Storefronts

Endpoint: `/api/v1/storefront/`

Create Storefront

Endpoint: `/api/v1/storefront/`

Read Collections

Endpoint: `/api/v1/storefront/collections`

Create Collection

Endpoint: `/api/v1/storefront/collections`

Update Collection

Endpoint: `/api/v1/storefront/collections/{collection_id}`

Read Collection Products

Endpoint: `/api/v1/storefront/collections/{collection_id}/products`

Add Product To Collection

Endpoint: `/api/v1/storefront/collections/{collection_id}/products`

Remove Product From Collection

Endpoint: `/api/v1/storefront/collections/{collection_id}/products/{published_product_id}`

Read Storefront Domains

Endpoint: `/api/v1/storefront/domains`

Create Storefront Domain

Endpoint: `/api/v1/storefront/domains`

Update Storefront Domain

Endpoint: `/api/v1/storefront/domains/{domain_id}`

Delete Storefront Domain

Endpoint: `/api/v1/storefront/domains/{domain_id}`

Read Navigation

Endpoint: `/api/v1/storefront/navigation`

Create Navigation Item

Endpoint: `/api/v1/storefront/navigation`

Update Navigation Item

Endpoint: `/api/v1/storefront/navigation/{navigation_item_id}`

Delete Navigation Item

Endpoint: `/api/v1/storefront/navigation/{navigation_item_id}`

Read Payment Gateways

Endpoint: `/api/v1/storefront/payment-gateways`

Create Payment Gateway

Endpoint: `/api/v1/storefront/payment-gateways`

Update Payment Gateway

Endpoint: `/api/v1/storefront/payment-gateways/{gateway_id}`

Read Public Storefront By Subdomain

Endpoint: `/api/v1/storefront/public/by-subdomain/{subdomain}`

Read Public Storefront

Endpoint: `/api/v1/storefront/public/{storefront_id}`

Read Public Storefront Account Me

Endpoint: `/api/v1/storefront/public/{storefront_id}/account/me`

Read Public Storefront Account Orders

Endpoint: `/api/v1/storefront/public/{storefront_id}/account/orders`

Change Public Storefront Account Password

Endpoint: `/api/v1/storefront/public/{storefront_id}/account/password`

Update Public Storefront Account Profile

Endpoint: `/api/v1/storefront/public/{storefront_id}/account/profile`

Login Public Storefront Account

Endpoint: `/api/v1/storefront/public/{storefront_id}/auth/login`

Recover Public Storefront Account Password

Endpoint: `/api/v1/storefront/public/{storefront_id}/auth/password-recovery`

Register Public Storefront Account

Endpoint: `/api/v1/storefront/public/{storefront_id}/auth/register`

Reset Public Storefront Account Password

Endpoint: `/api/v1/storefront/public/{storefront_id}/auth/reset-password`

Create Public Checkout Order

Endpoint: `/api/v1/storefront/public/{storefront_id}/checkout/orders`

Create Public Payment Intent

Endpoint: `/api/v1/storefront/public/{storefront_id}/checkout/payment-intent`

Read Public Payment Status

Endpoint: `/api/v1/storefront/public/{storefront_id}/checkout/payment-status`

Preview Public Checkout

Endpoint: `/api/v1/storefront/public/{storefront_id}/checkout/preview`

Read Public Collections

Endpoint: `/api/v1/storefront/public/{storefront_id}/collections`

Read Public Collection Detail

Endpoint: `/api/v1/storefront/public/{storefront_id}/collections/{slug}`

Send Public Storefront Contact Message

Endpoint: `/api/v1/storefront/public/{storefront_id}/contact`

Read Public Navigation

Endpoint: `/api/v1/storefront/public/{storefront_id}/navigation`

Read Public Payment Gateways

Endpoint: `/api/v1/storefront/public/{storefront_id}/payment-gateways`

Read Public Products

Endpoint: `/api/v1/storefront/public/{storefront_id}/products`

Read Public Product Detail

Endpoint: `/api/v1/storefront/public/{storefront_id}/products/{slug}`

Read Published Products

Endpoint: `/api/v1/storefront/published-products`

Create Published Product

Endpoint: `/api/v1/storefront/published-products`

Update Published Product

Endpoint: `/api/v1/storefront/published-products/{published_product_id}`

Update Storefront

Endpoint: `/api/v1/storefront/{storefront_id}`

Read Suppliers

Endpoint: `/api/v1/suppliers/`

Retrieve suppliers.

Create Supplier

Endpoint: `/api/v1/suppliers/`

Create new supplier.

Update Supplier

Endpoint: `/api/v1/suppliers/{supplier_id}`

Update a supplier.

Delete Supplier

Endpoint: `/api/v1/suppliers/{supplier_id}`

Delete a supplier.

Register Supplier Payment

Endpoint: `/api/v1/suppliers/{supplier_id}/payments`

Register a payment to lower the debt balance with a supplier.

Get Supplier Statement

Endpoint: `/api/v1/suppliers/{supplier_id}/statement`

Get the financial statement and ledger entries for a supplier.

Get Broadcast Message

Endpoint: `/api/v1/system/broadcast`

Set Broadcast Message

Endpoint: `/api/v1/system/broadcast`

Get Database Stats

Endpoint: `/api/v1/system/database-stats`

Get database statistics (Super Admin only).

System Health

Endpoint: `/api/v1/system/health`

Get system health metrics (Super Admin only).

Get Landing Config

Endpoint: `/api/v1/system/landing`

Get public landing page configuration + Dynamic Plans.

Update Landing Config

Endpoint: `/api/v1/system/landing`

Update landing page configuration (Super Admin only).

Get Maintenance Status

Endpoint: `/api/v1/system/maintenance`

Set Maintenance Mode

Endpoint: `/api/v1/system/maintenance`

List Units

Endpoint: `/api/v1/units-of-measure/`

Create Unit

Endpoint: `/api/v1/units-of-measure/`

Update Unit

Endpoint: `/api/v1/units-of-measure/{unit_id}`

Delete Unit

Endpoint: `/api/v1/units-of-measure/{unit_id}`

Upload File

Endpoint: `/api/v1/upload/`

Upload a file and return its URL.

Read Users

Endpoint: `/api/v1/users/`

Retrieve users.

Create User

Endpoint: `/api/v1/users/`

Create new user.

Read User Me

Endpoint: `/api/v1/users/me`

Get current user.

Read User

Endpoint: `/api/v1/users/{user_id}`

Get user by ID.

Update User

Endpoint: `/api/v1/users/{user_id}`

Update a user.

Delete User

Endpoint: `/api/v1/users/{user_id}`

Delete a user.

Send Recovery Email

Endpoint: `/api/v1/users/{user_id}/recovery-email`

Send password recovery email to a specific user (Admin only).
